title: equilabium acaule
intro: Equilabium acaule, also known as the 'stemless marsh marigold', is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Equilabium acaule include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
